[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111011 5
1 1111110 6
2 0011111 5
3 1111111 a
4 1111011 6
5 1101011 5
6 1110110 5
7 1111111 a

67 76 1101011 5 match 5
70 07 1100111 5

57 75 1110111 6
